html:
Exclusive to:

Dragoon Dens are naturally spawning Structures introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found inside the Volcano and spawn Dragoons. They can also be crafted, requiring 1 Dragoon Heart, 5 Rocks and 4 Obsidian to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Dragoon Dens cannot be Hammered, but they can be deconstructed using explosives, such as Gunpowder, Coconade or Slurtle Slime. It takes 2, 1, and 14 of each, respectively, to deconstruct a Den. Note that if using Slurtle Slime, it must be placed around the Den in 14 separate stacks.

They can house 3 to 4 Dragoons at a time. During the Day, one will leave the Den every 30 seconds, returning at Dusk. If a Dragoon dies, it takes 2 minutes for the Den to regenerate it.

Gallery

  • A Dragoon spawning from its Den.

Dragoon Dens are naturally spawning Structures introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found inside the Volcano and spawn Dragoons. They can also be crafted, requiring 1 Dragoon Heart, 5 Rocks and 4 Obsidian to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Dragoon Dens cannot be Hammered, but they can be deconstructed using explosives, such as Gunpowder, Coconade or Slurtle Slime. It takes 2, 1, and 14 of each, respectively, to deconstruct a Den. Note that if using Slurtle Slime, it must be placed around the Den in 14 separate stacks.
They can house 3 to 4 Dragoons at a time. During the Day, one will leave the Den every 30 seconds, returning at Dusk. If a Dragoon dies, it takes 2 minutes for the Den to regenerate it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hang Bồ Câu Rồng là Công Trình sinh sản tự nhiên được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng được tìm thấy bên trong Núi lửa và sinh ra Rồng. Chúng cũng có thể được chế tạo, yêu cầu 1 Tim Rồng, 5 Đá và 4 Đá Vỏ Chai để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Hang Rồng không thể bị đập, nhưng chúng có thể bị phá hủy bằng cách sử dụng chất nổ, chẳng hạn như Thuốc súng, Dừa hoặc Chất nhờn Sên. Mỗi loại cần 2, 1 và 14 viên tương ứng để giải mã một Hang. Lưu ý nếu sử dụng Slurtle Slime thì phải xếp xung quanh Hang thành 14 ngăn xếp riêng biệt.

'''Dragoon Dens''' are naturally spawning [[Structure]]s introduced in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They are found inside the [[Volcano]] and spawn [[Dragoons]]. They can also be crafted, requiring 1 [[Dragoon Heart]], 5 [[Rocks]] and 4 [[Obsidian]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Dragoon Dens cannot be [[Hammer]]ed, but they can be deconstructed using explosives, such as [[Gunpowder]], [[Coconade]] or [[Slurtle Slime]]. It takes 2, 1, and 14 of each, respectively, to deconstruct a Den. Note that if using Slurtle Slime, it must be placed around the Den in 14 separate stacks.

They can house 3 to 4 Dragoons at a time. During the [[Day]], one will leave the Den every 30 seconds, returning at Dusk. If a Dragoon dies, it takes 2 minutes for the Den to regenerate it.
